seeds.value: Production: critical, zero-downtime required. Staging: high, used for pre-production validation. Development: low, fast iteration.
seeds.description: Deployment environments and their criticality levels

seeds.value: Rollback trigger: >1% error rate for 5 minutes post-deploy. Warning: >0.5% error rate. Normal: <0.1% error rate.
seeds.description: Error rate thresholds for deployment health verification
